de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature

Class QueryExpandCost

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.QueryExpandCost
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feature

    public class QueryExpandCost
extends java.lang.Object
implements Feature
    A Feature that computes the cost for using the query expand rule.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int ConsideredAsBigLiteral
      If the literals in a query become greater than abs(ConsideredAsBigLiteral), then this is interpreted as a "loop smell", i.e.
      static RuleAppCost TOP_COST
      Constant that represents the boolean value false
      static RuleAppCost ZERO_COST
      Constant that represents the boolean value true

      QueryExpandCost(int baseCost, int maxRepetitionsOnSameTerm, int termAgeFactor, boolean useExperimentalHeuristics)

      Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
      int getMaxRepetitionsOnSameTerm() 
      protected static boolean isStepCaseBranch(Goal goal)
      This method determines whether the given goal belongs to a subtree of a step case or body preserves case.
      protected int queryExpandAlreadyAppliedAtPos(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal)
      The method checks if the same rule has been applied earlier on this branch at the same position in the sequent.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Field Detail

      • ZERO_COST

        public static final RuleAppCost ZERO_COST
        Constant that represents the boolean value true

      • TOP_COST

        public static final RuleAppCost TOP_COST
        Constant that represents the boolean value false

      • ConsideredAsBigLiteral

        public static final int ConsideredAsBigLiteral
        If the literals in a query become greater than abs(ConsideredAsBigLiteral), then this is interpreted as a "loop smell", i.e. the proof construction is in a loop and produces big literals.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Constructor Detail

      • QueryExpandCost

        public QueryExpandCost(int baseCost,
                       int maxRepetitionsOnSameTerm,
                       int termAgeFactor,
                       boolean useExperimentalHeuristics)
        Parameters:
        baseCost - Should be set to 200. This was the cost before this class was introduced.
        maxRepetitionsOnSameTerm - Search in the current branch if query expand has been already applied on this term. For each such application a penalty cost is added. If this limit is exceeded the cost is set to TOP_COST, i.e. the rule is not applied.
        termAgeFactor - This factor (must be >= 0) sets the cost of older queries lower, than that of younger queries (i.e. that occur later in proofs). The effect is a breath-first search on the expansion of queries. In class QueryExpand the time is stored, when queries can be expanded for the first time.
        useExperimentalHeuristics - Activates experimental, pattern-based heuristics.

    • Method Detail

      • computeCost

        public RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app,
                               PosInOccurrence pos,
                               Goal goal)
        Description copied from interface: Feature
        Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
        Specified by:
        computeCost in interface Feature
        Parameters:
        app - the RuleApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).

      • queryExpandAlreadyAppliedAtPos

        protected int queryExpandAlreadyAppliedAtPos(RuleApp app,
                                             PosInOccurrence pos,
                                             Goal goal)
        The method checks if the same rule has been applied earlier on this branch at the same position in the sequent. This method detects repetitive rule applications and is used to prevent loops in the proof tree.
        Parameters:
        app - The rule application.
        pos - The occurrence position.
        goal - The goal.
        Returns:
        The number of repetitive rule applications.

      • isStepCaseBranch

        protected static boolean isStepCaseBranch(Goal goal)
        This method determines whether the given goal belongs to a subtree of a step case or body preserves case. The search is done recursively for all parent nodes until either there are no more parent nodes or we have found an according (or opposing) branch label.
        Parameters:
        goal - the current proof goal
        Returns:
        a boolean saying whether the goal belongs to a step case

      • getMaxRepetitionsOnSameTerm

        public int getMaxRepetitionsOnSameTerm()
